name: Freelance Content Writer Agreement
description: A contract between a website owner/client and a freelance writer detailing content deliverables, revisions, payment, and copyright ownership.
content:
FREELANCE CONTENT WRITER AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Client and the Writer named below.

1. THE PARTIES

A. CLIENT:
Name / Company: {{client_name}}
Address: {{client_address}}
Website URL: {{website_url}}
Email: {{client_email}}

B. WRITER:
Name: {{writer_name}}
Address: {{writer_address}}
{{#if writer_tax_id}}Tax ID / SSN: {{writer_tax_id}}
{{/if}} Email: {{writer_email}}

2. SCOPE OF WORK

The Writer agrees to create and deliver written content (the "Content") for the Client’s website according to the following specifications:

{{content_details}}

3. DELIVERY AND REVISIONS

Delivery Schedule:

{{delivery_schedule}}

Delivery Format: {{delivery_format}}

The Client shall have {{revision_period_days}} days upon receipt of the Content to request revisions. The Writer agrees to provide up to {{free_revisions}} round(s) of reasonable revisions at no extra cost, provided the requests do not alter the original scope of work.

4. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT

The Client agrees to pay the Writer based on a {{pricing_model}} of {{payment_amount}}.

Payment Schedule: {{payment_schedule}}

Payment Method: {{payment_method}}

5. COPYRIGHT AND OWNERSHIP

{{#if (eq copyright_ownership 'Work Made for Hire (Transferred to Client)')}}

Work Made for Hire: All Content created by the Writer under this Agreement shall be considered "work made for hire." Upon full payment of the agreed fees, the Writer transfers and assigns all copyrights, publishing rights, and ownership of the Content to the Client. The Client may edit, publish, and attribute the Content as they see fit.

{{else}}

License Granted: The Writer retains the original copyright to the Content. Upon full payment, the Writer grants the Client a {{license_scope}} license to publish the Content exclusively on {{website_url}}.

{{/if}}

The Writer warrants that all Content submitted will be 100% original, completely free of plagiarism, and will not infringe upon the intellectual property rights of any third party.

6. CONFIDENTIALITY & INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR

The Writer shall keep all proprietary information provided by the Client confidential. The Writer is an independent contractor and not an employee of the Client.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

CLIENT
{{client_name}}

Signature: _________________________

WRITER
{{writer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: content_details
fields.label: Details of Content to be Created
fields.placeholder: e.g., 4 SEO blog posts per month, min 1000 words each.

fields.name: delivery_schedule
fields.label: Delivery Schedule
fields.placeholder: e.g., Every Friday by 5 PM EST.

fields.name: delivery_format
fields.label: Delivery Format
fields.placeholder: e.g., Google Docs, MS Word, direct CMS upload

fields.name: payment_schedule
fields.label: Payment Schedule
fields.placeholder: e.g., Net 15 days upon invoice receipt.

fields.name: copyright_ownership
fields.label: Copyright Ownership
options: Work Made for Hire (Transferred to Client)
